rows.Event Description: Downtown Phoenix’s 21+ Music, Arts & Counter Culture Festival—2 live music stages, murals, food & good vibes all night in Roosevelt Row! 🕓 📍 Buds-A-Palooza is back — bigger, louder, and wilder than ever. On April 11th, six city blocks of Roosevelt Row will come alive with live music, art, food, and good vibes as Phoenix’s favorite counter culture festival takes over the streets. We’re talking two stages of nonstop music, live glass blowing demos, massive murals being painted in real time, and 20+ food and dessert vendors bringing every kind of munchie imaginable. Add in six bars, local artisans, and plenty of surprises, and you’ve got one unforgettable night in the heart of downtown. From fiery glassblowing and massive murals to an interactive Buds-A-Palooza photo wall, this event is built for good times and even better memories. Whether you’re into reggae or hip-hop rhythms, street art, or just love being surrounded by fun people and good energy, you’ll fit right in at Buds-A-Palooza.

April is Filipino Food Month, and we’re celebrating the best way we know how… with a community food festival! Get ready to celebrate April - Filipino Food Month with music, food, and fun at the Filipinos Food Festival! Hosted by AZ Filipinos. This celebration will be a vibrant mix of tradition, talent, and togetherness. BYO Chair/Banig/Picnic Blanket :) Our mission is to connect Filipino Americans in Arizona through community building, culture, and celebration. AZ Filipinos aims to cultivate a vibrant, intergenerational Filipino community in Phoenix that honors our heritage, empowers our future, and creates inclusive spaces where every Filipino whether born here or newly arrived feels seen, celebrated, and connected.

rows.Event Name: MicroMania Midget Wrestling: Phoenix, AZ at Bull Shooters Night 1
rows.Event Description: MicroMania Midget Wrestling debuts at Bull Shooters in Phoenix, AZ on Saturday April 11th,2026 Night 1 21+ MicroMania Midget Wrestling debuts at Bull Shooters in Phoenix, AZ on Saturday April 11th, 2026 Night 1 MicroMania Midget Wrestling is a high powered, explosive, athletic Pro Wrestling show with just the right touch of comedy thrown in to make for a unforgettable BIG event not necessarily BIG people!! These 5 foot & under micro athletes may be short in stature but are giants in the world of entertainment where they will keep you on your feet screaming from the opening bell through the Main Event! MicroMania Midget Wrestling Promo Video Doors Open: 8pm Show Time: 9pm Age Restriction: 21+ Presale $20-General Admission * $40-Ringside ** Tickets $5 More Day of the Show $180-Guest Referee Package ** $300 -Sponsorship Package **** General admission varies per venue, it is sometimes standing or seated. **Ringside Seating consists of a guaranteed seat starting at the 1st Row and back. Depending on the venue capacity, there can be any number of Ringside seated rows, sometimes as many as 10. Seats are not numbered or reserved. In rare occasions Ringside doesn’t consist of a seat depending on Venue. ** Guest Referee Package Here’s your chance to be a part of our MicroMania show as a guest referee for one of our matches. The Package also includes exclusive training to turn an ordinary fan into a MicroMania Referee for the evening. So don’t miss your chance of a lifetime and climb into our MicroMania ring and become the talk of the town with the experience of a lifetime. Your Guest Referee Package is also your General Admission ticket to the event. Only 2 Referee Spots available per show *** Sponsorship PackageHere’s your chance to advertise your business and enjoy MicroMania Midget Wrestling at the same time with this rare opportunity to showcase your business with the Biggest Little Show in the USA. This Package includes 5 Free General Admission tickets.Call Billy Blade NOTE: Tickets are nonrefundable unless the show gets cancelled .Follow all things MicroMania Facebook: MicroMania Tour Instagram: MicroMania Tour Tik Tok: TheMicroManiaTour Website & Booking info:

Daytime Seminars are a big part of Arizona Tiki Oasis. You may purchase all seminar tickets a la carte. Tiki Oasis was founded upon a concern for architectural preservation of mid-century design. We are proud to partner with one of the most successful and exquisite examples of mid-century restoration and preservation in America — the Hotel Valley Ho! The Phoenix area, AKA the Valley of the Sun, has a long, rich history of Tiki Style. The warm weather of Scottsdale and the sumptuous comfort of the 4-Diamond resort make the Arizona Tiki Oasis weekend a relaxed and luxurious experience. Enjoy a wide range of resort activities while sipping tropical cocktails and wearing your festive aloha wear! Bask in a variety of curated experiences: sip crafted cocktails by top mixologists, browse the pop-up Art Show, relax in a cabana by the pool, schedule a soothing spa treatment, attend an educational seminar, relish the rooftop sunsets, sway to the Arizona Tiki Oasis soundtrack, reserve Hotel Valley Ho Supperclub Ticket, shop the outdoor marketplace with a variety of artists, makers and traders and, of course, enjoy the overall Tiki island-in-the-desert vibe.

Welcome to Arizona Tiki Oasis, a mid-century, cocktail, island lifestyle meet-up, held in the middle of the desert! Enjoy a wide range of resort activities while sipping tropical cocktails and wearing your aloha wear. Bask in a variety of curated experiences: sip craft cocktails by top mixologists, browse the Pop-up Art Show, relax in a private cabana by the pool, schedule a soothing spa treatment, attend an educational seminar, relish the rooftop sunsets, sway to the Tiki Oasis soundtrack, reserve Hotel Valley Ho dinner tickets, shop the outdoor marketplace with a variety of artists, makers and traders and, of course, enjoy the Tiki island-in-the-desert vibe. Although many events are all ages such as the marketplace and seminars, the overall event is adult-oriented. Arizona Tiki Oasis benefits Arizona Preservation Foundation.
